name: helioverse
description: Helioverse — Aurora Forecasting on a Live 3D Heliosphere

scripts.check:test: corepack pnpm -r run check:test && node --test scripts/learning/*.test.mjs
scripts.check:all: corepack pnpm contracts:validate && corepack pnpm check:types && corepack pnpm check:lint && corepack pnpm check:test
scripts.learning:run: corepack pnpm learning:collect && corepack pnpm learning:train && corepack pnpm check:learning
scripts.dev:web: corepack pnpm wasm:ensure && corepack pnpm --filter @helioverse/web dev
scripts.build:web: corepack pnpm build:wasm && corepack pnpm --filter @helioverse/web build
scripts.setup: corepack pnpm install && corepack pnpm build:wasm
